textPlain: Does anyone here know my mother's wifi password.... because she surely doesn't ;-)

Merry Christmas to you too! I'll be adding a plugin extension to Large World Coordinates in Unreal Engine inspired by Constructive Reals. It should let me use arbitrary precision, meaning I can make objects excessively small or large at distances excessively large or small in the engine.

Merry Christmas!Finally got some me-time, so I hacked together a pub quiz app for a friend and me. We'll be hosting the yearly pub quiz for friends and familyLast year I  was thinking of a complex authorization mess for persistence, but I realized a team code is 100x easier. I just store everything locally, no one is smart enough to hack it (I'd be happy if they can even enter the 4 digits)Normally we do it on PowerPoints, but now I want to see if I can get any cool animations in pure css going :)

Merry Christmas HN!Today I've bought food and drink, prepped a nut roast to cook tomorrow, watched the sky get dark, and am now enjoying a small glass of chilled fino and a chat with my children before I wrap some gifts. I'm looking forward to a tech-light day tomorrow.For another year you've been the place I've gone to for interest and enlightenment and curiosity. Thank you all, however you choose to spend this time of year.
Happy Christmas! If an Uber delivery driver loses your order somehow; no he didn't.If you spot someone with a trolley full of food sprinting out of the supermarket; no you didn't.
Merry Christmas to you too! I'm fixing an issue in /etc/networking caused by a non atomic write process. Friends don't let friends copy unguarded!
Ukrainian, will be celebrating it in January, but Merry Christmas to those who celebrate it today!
Merry Christmas, HN! Christ is King.
Merry Christmas! I’ll be installing NextDNS profile on both my parents iPhones!

Merry Christmas all! My technical fix is to try and stop a leaking pipe which so far is going very badly.

Merry CHRISTmas HN! Got a super awesome CHRISTmas gift - this Kosmos run is probably saying that I found a "“Parsimonious Multi-Module Multi-Omics Stacked Classifier for Neonatal Hypothermia Neuroprotection” https://platform.edisonscientific.com/kosmos/ef0a71d0-ca4d-4...

« J༙྇o༙྇y༙྇e༙྇u༙྇x༙྇ N༙྇o༙྇e༙྇l༙྇ »Showed a friend on his way back to Africa how to set up his iPhone to share his name and photo in Messages.// TY, politicians, for forcing the iPhone's "Phone" settings to hide under the "Apps" sub-category — making tech e̵a̵s̵i̵e̵r̵ harder one casual at a time!

In the morning I finished figuring out how Vivotek cameras store private keys for  AWS KVS streaming. They are encrypted on disk. Disassembling some executables I managed to reverse engineer the encryption keys. Apparently Vivotek things obscurity is security…
With the encryption keys we can switch to a custom made solution, while reusing the same certificates as before.

None, I was laid off and I'm working something completely unrelated to pay the bills. About to crack a beer and have some Chinese while watching pirated movies because I canceled my Netflix to cut costs.Gonna watch Die Hard, eat a beef chow fun, and try to teach my bird some new curse words.

What is someone is hiding something from your religion?
 Have a good read:قَالَ إِنِّی عَبۡدُ ٱللَّهِ ءَاتَىٰنِیَ ٱلۡكِتَـٰبَ وَجَعَلَنِی نَبِیࣰّا﴿ ٣٠ ﴾‬ ‫وَجَعَلَنِی مُبَارَكًا أَیۡنَ مَا كُنتُ وَأَوۡصَـٰنِی بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ مَا دُمۡتُ حَیࣰّا﴿ ٣١ ﴾‬ ‫وَبَرَّۢا بِوَ ٰ لِدَتِی وَلَمۡ یَجۡعَلۡنِی جَبَّارࣰا شَقِیࣰّا﴿ ٣٢ ﴾‬ ‫وَٱلسَّلَـٰمُ عَلَیَّ یَوۡمَ وُلِدتُّ وَیَوۡمَ أَمُوتُ وَیَوۡمَ أُبۡعَثُ حَیࣰّا﴿ ٣٣ ﴾‬ ‫ذَ ٰ لِكَ عِیسَى ٱبۡنُ مَرۡیَمَۖ قَوۡلَ ٱلۡحَقِّ ٱلَّذِی فِیهِ یَمۡتَرُونَ﴿ ٣٤ ﴾‬‫[But] he said: ‘I am a servant of God. He has granted me the Scripture; made me a prophet;
made me blessed wherever I may be. He commanded me to pray, to give alms as long as I live,
to cherish my mother. He did not make me domineering or graceless.
Peace was on me the day I was born, and will be on me the day I die and the day I am raised to life again.’
Such was Jesus, son of Mary. [This is] a statement of the Truth about which they are in doubt:‫مَا كَانَ لِلَّهِ أَن یَتَّخِذَ مِن وَلَدࣲۖ سُبۡحَـٰنَهُۥۤۚ إِذَا قَضَىٰۤ أَمۡرࣰا فَإِنَّمَا یَقُولُ لَهُۥ كُن فَیَكُونُ﴿ ٣٥ ﴾‬ ‫وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ رَبِّی وَرَبُّكُمۡ فَٱعۡبُدُوهُۚ هَـٰذَا صِرَ ٰ طࣱ مُّسۡتَقِیمࣱ﴿ ٣٦ ﴾‬ ‫فَٱخۡتَلَفَ ٱلۡأَحۡزَابُ مِنۢ بَیۡنِهِمۡۖ فَوَیۡلࣱ لِّلَّذِینَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن مَّشۡهَدِ یَوۡمٍ عَظِیمٍ﴿ ٣٧ ﴾‬it would not befit God to have a child. He is far above that: when He decrees something, He says only, ‘Be,’ and it is.
‘God
 is my Lord and your Lord, so serve Him: that is a straight path.’
But factions have differed among themselves. What suffering will come to those who obscure the truth when a dreadful Day arrives!Surah Maryam
